name: Hubei Zhenhua Chemical Co.,Ltd.
summary: Hubei Zhenhua Chemical Co.,Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, and marketing of chromium salts in China. The company offers sodium bichromate and dichromate, chromic acid anhydride, crystal chromic acid anhydride, liquid chromic anhydride, chrome oxide green, chromic trioxide, potassium dichromate, basic chrome sulphate, vitamin K3, sodium sulphate, aluminium hydroxide, etc. It also exports its products to Europe, the United States, Africa, and Southeast Asia. The company was formerly known as Huanghsi Zhenhua Chemical Industry Co., Ltd. Hubei Zhenhua Chemical Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1967 and is based in Huangshi, China.
